org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.

    Create a IS NOT NULL predicate.

    Create a less < … predicate.

    Create a less-or-equals <= … predicate.

    Create a MEMBER OF &lt;collection&gt; predicate.

    Create a &lt;&gt; (not equals) predicate.
    default JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate.nest()
    Wrap this predicate with parenthesis (…) to nest it without affecting AND/OR concatenation precedence.
    static JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
